items.title: Spurs made some real adjustments that panned out in a major way in Game 3.
items.author: Justesbaraheni
items.body_excerpt:
Spurs made some real adjustments that panned out in a major way in Game 3. 

Wemby on Hart permanently + Keldon on KAT to help them force more turnovers. 21 points off 13 turnovers for them. 

They also scored 40 points in the restricted area. Wemby/Castle/Harper cooked inside.

items.title: Victor Wembanyama is embracing being New York's newest villain. With a caveat.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt:
Victor Wembanyama is embracing being New York's newest villain. With a caveat.

"I guess," he said. "I'm nowhere near Trae Young's level."

items.title: The 24 free throw attempts the Spurs had in the second half of Game 3 was their most in any half of this postseason and tied for the most in any half they have played including the regular season
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
The 24 free throw attempts the Spurs had in the second half of Game 3 was their most in any half of this postseason and tied for the most in any half they have played including the regular season

*not a comment on the officiating

items.title: Mike Brown not happy with the free-throw discrepancy: “Maybe we did foul,” he said. “But we fouled, too.” Brown pointing out the Spurs taking 24 free throws in the second half compared to eight for the Knicks.

items.title: Victor Wembanyama finished with 32 points, 8 rebounds, 6 assists, and 3 blocks in Game 3. He joins Hakeem Olajuwon and Patrick Ewing as the only players to do that in a postseason game at Madison Square Garden since blocks first became official in 1973-74.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Victor Wembanyama finished with 32 points, 8 rebounds, 6 assists, and 3 blocks in Game 3. He joins Hakeem Olajuwon and Patrick Ewing as the only players to do that in a postseason game at Madison Square Garden since blocks first became official in 1973-74.

items.title: Victor Wembanyama with 32 points in the win, becoming the third-youngest player to have 30+ points in the Finals in NBA history.
items.author: Keerthika Uthayakumar
items.body_excerpt:
Victor Wembanyama with 32 points in the win, becoming the third-youngest player to have 30+ points in the Finals in NBA history. 

Youngest since Magic Johnson in 1980.

items.title: The 3-headed guard monster of Stephon Castle, De'Aaron Fox, and Dylan Harper struggle to shoot ... but those guards played to their strengths in Game 3, combining for 17 assists and 4 turnovers.
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
The 3-headed guard monster of Stephon Castle, De'Aaron Fox, and Dylan Harper struggle to shoot ... but those guards played to their strengths in Game 3, combining for 17 assists and 4 turnovers.

That AST-TO ratio for that trio was 9:6 in Game 1 and 12:10 in Game 2.

items.title: I don’t know, I think they lost because Jeter was there, honestly.

items.title: This matchup deserves some juice, glad Wemby and the Spurs made it so
items.author: Doug Smith

This matchup deserves some juice, glad Wemby and the Spurs made it so
Delightful game and happy the NBA Finals are going at least 5 and hopefully 6 or 7
Oh yeah, old friend OG was a monster tonight

items.title: Knicks would have signed up for a 2-1 lead in the NBA Finals thru 3 games…
items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt:
Knicks would have signed up for a 2-1 lead in the NBA Finals thru 3 games…

Still in control 

They have an opportunity to take a 3-1 lead by winning a home game on Wednesday.

Ball up top.

items.title: Jalen Brunson tonight: 3/9 in the paint
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Jalen Brunson tonight: 3/9 in the paint

He was great when he got all the way to the rim, but the Spurs did an excellent job of making life difficult for him when he tried to attack.

No longer having Wemby guard KAT was a difference-maker.

items.title: After Victor Wembanyama ended Game 1 by dribbling off of his foot and ended Game 2 by passing to Stephon Castle's back, he had only one turnover tonight, and none in the final three quarters.
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt: After Victor Wembanyama ended Game 1 by dribbling off of his foot and ended Game 2 by passing to Stephon Castle's back, he had only one turnover tonight, and none in the final three quarters.

items.title: Interesting Saturday night test coming up. Game 5 of the Finals, either the Knicks trying to clinch their first title since '73 or a 2-2 series. World Cup competition. Will go a long way to telling us just how different 'the least-watched night of the week' is in "Big Data" era.
items.author: Sports Media Watch
items.body_excerpt: Interesting Saturday night test coming up. Game 5 of the Finals, either the Knicks trying to clinch their first title since '73 or a 2-2 series. World Cup competition. items.title: Karma is my boyfriend
items.author: Richard Deitsch
items.body_excerpt:
Karma is my boyfriend
Karma is a god
Karma is the breeze in my hair on the weekend
Karma's a relaxing thought
